subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: You have asked me for an explanation about soul. Man possesses a gift by which he is distinguished from all other creatures—a spiritual principle which is bodiless
subcodes.subjects: @the human soul, @man's distinction from the animal, @mind as principle emanation; activity of the human spirit, @the mind's power of discovery, @mind as intermediary between soul and body, @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @soul is the essential reality of man
